titleStmt.title: SII 24.369: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 369. (A.R. No. 93 of 1936-37.) INNER WALL OF THE VIṬṬHALA SHRINE IN THE RAṄGAVILĀSA-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Records that 2 vēli of land belonging to the temple were allotted for worship to the images of Viṭṭhalēśvara and Madurakavi-Āḻvār. Refers to the construction of a maṇḍapa and the formation of a garden by Kandāḍai Mādhavayyaṅgar. Also refers to a shrine of Tiruppāṇ-Āḻvār. See No. 357 above in continuation of which this inscription is engraved.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . yuvavaruṣam kārttikai mātam 10 2 tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati
viṭṭaleśvaraṉukkum yivar koyil śrī maturakavi Āḻvārkkum perumāḷ tiruvuḷam paṟṟiṉa tirumukappaṭi
rūpāy 2- likku viparam tirumuṭikkuṟaiyil cervai Āṉa rūpāy muḷḷicey vaṭṭam rūpāy-(1/4) māṇikka nācci Oṭai rūpāy
(1/4) 3pa māṇikkaṉ kuḻi tiṭar cuṟṟu Uḷpaṭṭa rūpāy (1/4) 2pa niṉṟiyūril cetta rūpāy periya vaṭṭam rūpāy (1/2) 2pa® yituvum
catiram paḷḷam rūpāy (1/4) 2pa® Āka nilam yiruveliyum perumāḷ tiruvuḷḷam pattiṉapaṭiyiṉāle cantraātitya va
raiyum naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum . yituvum tiruppaṇi toppu tirumaṇṭapattu nilam rā
ya kopuran tirumataḷukkut terukku Aṭi 2 100 ciṅkar kovil karaivaḻi
naṭaikkuk keḻakku tiruppāṇ Āḻvār kovilellaikki merukku yinta nilam 4 li śrī raṅganāthan
ci paṇṭārattukku tiraviyumumRead tiraviyamummutaliṭṭu vāṅki maṇṭapamuṅ kaṭṭiviccu toppum
kaṭṭu viccār
viṭṭalecuraṉ tirupratiṣṭhai
mutal tiruvārādhanam kṛṣṇa
Upādyāt san=tānaparampa
rai sadāsevai
mādhavaiyaṅkar dharmam .
Digital edition of SII 24.369 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
